summary: Stage the complete M5/M6 application as Windows candidate 0.1.0-beta.2 without changing the still-public 0.1.0-beta.1 site, installer, or support claims before release proof exists.

decisions.decision: Stage the completed M5/M6 application as 0.1.0-beta.2, the next version explicitly anticipated by the existing beta.1 rollback plan, while retaining beta.1 as the immutable previous public release.
decisions.rationale: The next prerelease replaces rather than rewrites the first beta and keeps the established 0.1.0 beta line while the product remains Windows-first and pre-1.0.

decisions.decision: Track the application build version in CANDIDATE_VERSION and native/web application manifests independently from PUBLIC_VERSION and website release.json. Do not advance the live site, supported download, security support line, or public documentation until the signed candidate passes and is published.
decisions.rationale: A signed installer hash is unknowable before the hosted artifact exists. Separating candidate and public facts avoids both a circular build/hash workflow and a false live download claim during qualification.

testEvidence.criterion: Candidate application metadata may advance without mutating the current public release contract.
testEvidence.test: Require all application manifests, both Cargo lockfiles, the application title, and CANDIDATE_VERSION to agree on beta.2 while PUBLIC_VERSION and the website continue to identify the real beta.1 download and checksum.

red.outcome: RED: CANDIDATE_VERSION did not exist and every application manifest still identified beta.1.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/release-metadata.test.ts --reporter=dot; cargo metadata --locked --no-deps --format-version 1 for both manifests
green.outcome: GREEN: both release-metadata tests passed, both locked Cargo graphs accepted beta.2, and the public site/download contract remained exactly beta.1.

questions: Q-0042 remains the only literal M6 specification contradiction; the release notes do not claim its prohibited Base Material tag wording is satisfied.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
